_doc: Methodology changelog — material changes to the engine, the indicator framework, or the scoring math. Owned by Senior Quant + Data Steward; updated by manual PR when a model/calibration ships. Joe Path-A directive 2026-05-27: dates + notes here are reference facts, not market data, so they live in this curated file rather than hardcoded in the Methodology page.

entries.note: Daily rebalance pipeline moved to next-morning. Massive 8:00 ET → Asset Tilt 8:15 ET → Trading Ops scanner 8:30 ET → Paper Portfolio queues trades into Alpaca 9:00 ET (Tue-Sat, 30 min before the 9:30 open). Same-day evening runs only captured ~0.5% of the universe because Polygon's full batch lands 2-8 AM ET the next morning.

Treasury yields moved off FRED to U.S. Treasury (Treasury.gov) for same-day publication. Affects 10Y-2Y slope, 10Y TIPS real rate, and 10Y inflation breakeven. FRED publishes T+1; Treasury.gov publishes same-day around 4 PM ET.

Daily-indicator freshness gate added. The producer now fails loudly if any daily indicator exceeds its publication SLA — workflow goes red and the prior good file is preserved instead of being overwritten with a stale value.
Site overhaul — prototype-faithful rebuild of all 9 pages, shared components, regime hook.
Trading Scanner rebuilt — dual-direction, dark pool + options scoring went live.
Indicator framework finalized. NAAIM and SPX-vs-200dma retired.
v11 Cycle Mechanism Board became the Macro Overview anchor; old composites deprecated.
Massive (Polygon) integration phase 1 — universe master replaces UW screener.
Scenario Analysis v1 launched, aligned to CCAR US-16 factor panel.
